case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. ANA LIZZETH AMADOR

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. FKA PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $45.00 SERVED MAY-28-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT AMADOR, ANA LIZZETH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-06-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-06-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE, ENNY CUDNY. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ANA LIZZETH AMADOR. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-06-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. FKA PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMADOR, ANA LIZZETH $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,645.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT HAS BEEN FULLY PAID OR SATISFIED AS TO ALL JUDGMENT DEBTORS. AS TO DEFENDANT AMADOR, ANA LIZZETH
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. FKA PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT AMADOR, ANA LIZZETH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-06-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
